title: selaginella prasina
intro: Selaginella prasina, also known as prickly pea moss, is a species of vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella prasina include its ability to aid in the treatment of various respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Selaginella prasina is often dried and made into teas or infusions, or used in capsule form to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
